categories.label: Identity Consistency
categories.description: Check face and character continuity across portrait, battlefield, and domestic shots.

categories.label: House And Environment Consistency
categories.description: Check architecture, field geography, and lighting continuity for the house and landscape.

categories.label: Historical Coherence
categories.description: Check older-war visual language, modern FPV reveal, and avoid timeline confusion.

categories.label: Transition Readability
categories.description: Check whether shot-to-shot bridges are understandable and visually intentional.

categories.label: Motion Coherence
categories.description: Check movement direction, camera logic, and whether motion feels physically credible.

categories.label: Tone And Style Drift
categories.description: Check whether the output stays mournful, restrained, and anti-spectacle.

categories.label: Impact Readability
categories.description: Check whether the final house is recognizable before the blast overwhelms the frame.

categories.label: Technical Artifacts
categories.description: Check for malformed anatomy, texture glitches, unwanted text, or image corruption.
